---
title: Panache
url: https://panache.bz
author:
  - Johan Larsson
date: 2026-03-28
github: jolars/panache
crate: panache
image: logo.svg
categories: Rust
description: |
  A language server, formatter, and linter for Pandoc, Quarto, and R Markdown.
citation:
  author:
    - family: Larsson
      given: Johan
  genre: R
  issued: 2026-03-28
  license: MIT
  source: GitHub
  title: "Panache: A Language Server, Formatter, and Linter for Pandoc, Quarto, and R Markdown"
  type: software
  URL: https://panache.bz
  version: v2.28.0
---
